message:
refactor(search,tui): import reordering, match arm consolidation, dead-code annotation, and test assertion formatting

search_service.rs:
- Reorder imports alphabetically per rustfmt 2024 edition style
- Consolidate two identical SearchPhase::Initial/Refined match arms into
  a single or-pattern (Initial { results, .. } | Refined { results, .. })
  in select_fast_first_two_tier_results
- Lift non-hybrid search_core imports out of #[cfg(feature = "hybrid")]
  block since they are used unconditionally
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to try_two_tier_search since it is only called
  via the non-Cx path which may be unused in some feature combinations
- Reformat multi-line assert! expressions for readability

dashboard.rs:
- Reformat assertion blocks and closure expressions for consistent style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
